headline: Should Builders FirstSource’s New Buyback After a Loss Reframe BLDR’s Capital Allocation Story?
summary: In late April 2026, Builders FirstSource reported a weak first quarter with net sales of US$3,287.08 million and a net loss of US$47.41 million, while issuing full-year 2026 net sales guidance of US$14.60 billion to US$15.60 billion and announcing a new US$500 million share repurchase authorization after completing a prior buyback plan. Despite the earnings setback, management signaled continued confidence in the business by committing fresh capital to buybacks and reiterating its intention...
